description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes code on every push to the master branch, on pull requests to master, and weekly on a scheduled basis. Run the analysis on a matrix of Windows, macOS, and Ubuntu environments with read permissions for actions and contents, and write permissions for security events. The workflow checks out the repository, initializes CodeQL for C++ with a custom config file, sets up luamake, runs luamake, and performs the CodeQL analysis.
